lines.speaker: Gamfred
lines.text: Ello there. I'm Gamfred, the engineer in this here guild. Have you seen my catapult?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's not a catapult, it's a large crossbow.

lines.speaker: Gamfred
lines.text: WHAT!? I'll have you know that is the finest piece of dwarven engineering for miles around! How DARE you insult my work!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, beautiful piece of engineering.

lines.speaker: Gamfred
lines.text: Nice to meet someone who appreciates fine work, have you tried it out yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: Gamfred
lines.text: What did you think?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It was ok I guess.

lines.speaker: Gamfred
lines.text: Well I guess not everyone will like it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It was fun!

lines.speaker: Gamfred
lines.text: Glad ta hear it. Try it again sometime. We have more tests to run.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I didn't like it.

lines.speaker: Gamfred
lines.text: Well I guess not everyone will like it. But give it another chance before you go.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: May I have a shield please?

lines.speaker: Gamfred
lines.text: Silly muffin, you have one already!

lines.speaker: Gamfred
lines.text: I'd be happy ta give you a shield but you've no space for it.

lines.speaker: Gamfred
lines.text: Of course!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, how do I do that?

lines.speaker: Gamfred
lines.text: Well ye take the big defence shield in both hands and watch the catapult. My assistant will fire different things at you and you need to defend against them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds boring.

lines.speaker: Gamfred
lines.text: Your loss...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, where is it?

lines.speaker: Gamfred
lines.text: Are ye blind [lad/lass]? Tis over there in the next room with me assistant working it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: May I claim my tokens please?

lines.speaker: Gamfred
lines.text: You don't have space to carry them.

lines.speaker: Gamfred
lines.text: Of course! Here you go, you've earned [number] token[s]!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Gamfred
lines.text: I'm afraid you have not earned any tokens yet. Try some of the activities around the guild to earn some.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, I'll go see what I can find.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bye!

lines.speaker: Gamfred
lines.text: Come back soon! My catapult needs more test subjects.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: May I claim my tokens please?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: May I have a shield please?

sections.title: Standing on the marker without a shield

lines.speaker: Gamfred
lines.text: Watch out! You'll need to equip the shield as soon as you're on the target spot else you could get hit! Speak to me to get one, and make sure both your hands are free to equip it.
